data.title: Keysight Introduces 220 GHz Lightwave Component Analyzer to Validate Next-Generation Optical Transceiver Technology
data.description: A newly developed analyzer in Santa Rosa, California is set to revolutionize the design and validation process for high-speed optical interconnects by aiding in the creation and testing of 1.6/3.2 Tb/s optical transmitter and receiver components. This advancement is expected to significantly enhance the efficiency and speed of developing cutting-edge optical technology.

data.title: Premise Health and Crossover Health complete merger, embark on transformation
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, it was revealed on March 12, 2026, that Premise Health and Crossover Health have officially merged. This merger results in a unified entity that will cater to over 400 organizations and millions of members, managing close to 900 wellness centers located onsite and nearsite in 47 states.

data.title: Altcoin Vector 45 decreases as BTC dominance reaches 58%, with total market cap at $2.36 trillion amid March volatility.
data.description: Glassnode recently published their weekly analysis on altcoins in the crypto market. The report comes as Bitcoin dominance reaches 58.78% and the total market capitalization of all cryptocurrencies hits $2.36 trillion amidst increased volatility in March.

data.title: Miami upgrades to Oracle's AI-powered permitting platform, replacing 8 old systems. OPAL used by Manhattan, KS. Read more.
data.description: The City of Miami has recently integrated its permitting operations into Oracle's OPAL platform, becoming a part of the growing trend of municipal AI modernization. This move aligns Miami with Manhattan, Kansas, in harnessing advanced technologies for improved efficiency. By consolidating permitting processes within the OPAL platform, Miami aims to streamline operations and enhance overall effectiveness. This shift towards automation is indicative of a wider trend in local governance towards leveraging AI for optimized service delivery.

data.title: GoodWe reinforce leadership in EU residential energy storage market at launch of world-first certified low-noise solution in Amsterdam
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Amsterdam, GoodWe unveiled its new ESA Series residential all-in-one energy storage solution at a product launch event. The ESA Series aims to cater to the increasing need for energy independence among European homeowners. The event highlighted the features and benefits of the product as it seeks to address the needs of consumers in Europe.

data.title: National Fuel Declares Quarterly Dividend and Reports Preliminary Voting Results from the Annual Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: On March 12, 2026, the Board of Directors of National Fuel Gas Company (NYSE: NFG) announced a quarterly dividend of 53.5 cents per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026, will receive the dividend on April 15, 2026. With roughly 95.0 million common shares in circulation and no preferred shares outstanding, the approved dividend marks another step in the company's shareholder value commitment.

data.title: Victory+ Shatters Records with 342,000+ Viewers for Dallas Stars–Colorado Avalanche Matchup, Validating Free Local Streaming at National Scale
data.description: Victory+ made headlines in Dallas with an impressive milestone, drawing an unprecedented 342,000 viewers for a thrilling Dallas Stars versus Colorado Avalanche matchup. This significant achievement showcased Victory+'s ability to reach a national audience while operating within a regional scope.

data.title: Global nations rush to secure oil amid escalating attacks at sea. US, Israel intensify strikes on Iran; Lebanon toll rises.
data.description: The U.S. and Israel have carried out additional attacks on Iran, as crowds in Iran mourned the loss of military commanders killed in the conflict. Israel also conducted airstrikes in Lebanon, resulting in a rise in the death toll in the region.
